new_value: {"notes":"Fix applied in commit e6e3c12b9 (and prior review fixes 93d7bff1d). Hysteresis now correctly checks is_admissible(d, cur) before staying with current parent. Matches suggested patch in bead description. Verified with native_sim RPL tests."}

Fixed: added is_admissible(d, cur) guard to hysteresis in lichen_rpl_dodag_select_parent() (dodag.c:247). Matches bead suggestion and RFC 6550 §8.2.2.4. Verified in current code at e6e3c12b9; RPL trickle/schc tests pass on native_sim.
